codeReview.summary: The UI code change correctly introduces a distinct dashboard error-state branch with actionable Retry/Open Settings controls, but the added regression tests do not validate that rendering/action contract. The feature's test-contract expectation is therefore not fully satisfied.

issues.description: The added tests (`test_errorState_isDistinctFromEmptyState` and `test_errorState_hasActionableRecovery`) only assert store-level profile/state behavior and never instantiate/assert `DashboardQuickSwitchView` error rendering or Retry/Open Settings controls. These tests would still pass if the new `errorStateView` branch were removed, so they do not verify the required error-rendering regression contract.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked `followedProcedure: true`, but the skill requires manual UI sanity checks and none were recorded.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: switcher-ui-worker SKILL.md step 7 requires manual UI sanity checks; handoff file `/Users/dewclaw/.factory/missions/11939f59-0807-4ae2-ae9a-d828e0733f7d/handoffs/2026-04-09T15-32-50-171Z__fast-surfaces-fix-dashboard-load-error-rendering__a5d3b023-4e2f-4b50-8669-074222d3ef17.json` shows `verification.interactiveChecks: []` with `skillFeedback.followedProcedure: true`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The skill requires scoped plus broad app validation, but the handoff only records scoped xcodebuild plus build-for-testing.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: switcher-ui-worker SKILL.md step 6 specifies scoped test + `scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh`; this handoff's `verification.commandsRun` includes only scoped `xcodebuild test ... -only-testing:"OpenBurnBarTests/SwitcherDashboardUITests"` and `xcodebuild build-for-testing`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Procedure requires context-read evidence when `followedProcedure` is true, but no such evidence was included in verification commands.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: switcher-ui-worker SKILL.md handoff-discipline section requires explicit context-read commands in `verification.commandsRun`; this handoff includes only build/test commands.

summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and relevant skill/docs. The rendering fix itself is present and aligned with requirements, but the new regression tests do not cover the UI error-rendering/action path, so this review is a fail.
